dr_section_ref: DR §1 (also as juga-alias) + DR §6.3 (gender-neutral dia → they)
notes: Two-rule fixture (post Story 3.2b Phase 4): (1) TQ-1 'also' loanword mid-sentence; (2) TQ-3 gender-neutral 'dia → they'. Code-switched 'also' is semantically identical to 'juga' — same rare-usage caveat as case_001 (if this construction is never used, the rule can be deleted). VERIFY WITH GIRLFRIEND: code-switching frequency in your conversational register + whether 'They came too' (current expected_target) or 'They also came' is more natural.
